emails.subject: RE: ENA Upstream issues
emails.body: RE: ENA Upstream issues We are currently not including any evergreen clauses in any of the Upstream contracts with the exception of GISB's and Masters. Judy

emails.subject: RE: ENA Upstream issues
emails.body: RE: ENA Upstream issues The last day of the month should be used as the default. We are only changing this date when counterparties have been settling with ENA on a different date. Judy

emails.subject: RE: ENA Upstream issues
emails.body: Can we get the language added to cover the payment due date if it falls on a holiday or weekend? Per our discussion on 09/26/01, I have set the default in Global Contracts as next following business day, but it's not in writing either in the GTC or the confirmation language. Thanks, SBR

emails.subject: RE: ENA Upstream issues
emails.body: Please ignore that last email. I see where the language was added under Section 6. My apologies.
